policy.setup_network: allowed for the pinned Git fetch and image pull only

terminal_nonconvergence.purpose: Deliberate engine-boundary injection isolated from the inverter DUT; it does not assert that the DUT is unstable.

mapping.description: The four official protection-switch device records are ASCII-normalized (micro sign to u), node/instance names are namespaced, and injected without electrical connection to Vin, Vout, Vdd, or GND except the global reference node 0.

measurements.interpretation: Linearly interpolated retained v(vout) samples at 0.3 us, inside the first settled-high window.
Minimum retained v(vout) sample over the complete native transient.
Maximum retained v(vout) sample over the complete native transient.
Arithmetic mean of retained adaptive v(vout) samples; this is not a time-weighted electrical average.
RMS of retained adaptive v(vout) samples; this is not a time-weighted electrical RMS.
First linearly interpolated rising 0.6 V crossing of the explicit input pulse.
First complete retained v(vout) 10%-to-90% rising transition, caused by the input falling edge.
First complete retained v(vout) 90%-to-10% falling transition, caused by the input rising edge.
Elapsed time from 1.5 us until every retained tail sample stays within 1.2 V +/- 0.1 V for at least 0.2 us.
